tools.name: analyze_yield_opportunities
tools.description: Identify the highest-returning passive income opportunities across asset classes. Use when the user wants to generate passive income, maximize portfolio yield, or find dividend and interest-bearing investments.

tools.name: optimize_income_portfolio
tools.description: Build and rebalance a diversified portfolio to maximize recurring income. Use when the user wants to achieve financial independence through investment income or optimize an existing portfolio for yield.
